title: genista scorpius subsp. scorpius
intro: Genista scorpius subsp. scorpius, also known as broom or Scotch broom, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Genista scorpius subsp. scorpius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to promote digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues.
